---
name: Feature request
about: A new diagram type, option, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What you'd like**
The feature, as concretely as you can describe it.

**Use case**
The problem it solves — CTI / protocol / reverse-engineering context welcome.

**Area**
Which part of pivot: `packet`, `struct`, the theme, a brand-new diagram type, …

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to get there, or what you've tried.

**Note**
Some things are deliberately out of scope — e.g. force-directed / general-graph auto-layout. pivot does structured, deterministic layout only.
